Appearances:
Plaintiff Robert Chee is not present-available by telephone standby.
Attorney Jeffrey E. Margulies, Esq., appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gretchen Vogel is present.
Attorney Taylor Davis, Attorney at Law, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Juliana Pisani, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504, for settlement discussions.

***** This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
***** This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
